name: Dr. Lena Vasquez
profile: Staff research scientist in machine learning. 27 peer-reviewed papers, 5,100 citations, h-index 38, including a 2024 ICML oral. Won the Outstanding Paper award at ICLR 2023. Granted US patent 12,114,778 for a distributed-training method. Reviewer for JMLR and an area chair for NeurIPS. Authored and shipped TENSORLOOM, an open-source training framework on GitHub with 22,000 stars used at 60+ companies. Featured in IEEE Spectrum. Total compensation 295,000 USD.
